name: Goats Cheese, Peanut and Soy Sauce
steps: Whip albumin, egg white and sugar syrup on medium speed.
Incorporate with base a little at a time and blend.
Spread out on a silpat and dehydrate over night at 50C.
Heat under salamander and shape to desired texture.
Mix the two ingredients together and blend.
Leave to rest overnight in fridge.
Warm the sugar syrup to pour over the banana and leave to hydrate.
Freeze in paco container but do not fill to the line.
Mix together and bring to boil whisking constantly.
